p.underline: Re: Application for Postgraduate Admission - X. X. and X. X.

text.p: Please refer to the letters of 9th March and 2nd April on the above subject matter from the Secretary of the Postgraduate College. (A copy of each of the letters is attached.)
I wish to inform you that the Department of English is prepared to release both Mr. X. X. and Mr. X. X. (Assistant Lecturers) on a part-time basis for their Ph.D work.
I should indeed be grateful if you would consider giving Mr and Mr the required Letters of Release, so that the processing of their admission could be completed by the Postgraduate College.
